video_url.description: URL of the source video to recomposite. Allowed formats: MP4, MOV (H.264 or HEVC), up to 240 frames. Source must not exceed 2,770,000 total pixels.

alpha_url.description: URL of the alpha mask. Required when alpha_mode is "custom" or "select"; ignored for "auto" and "fill". A mask video for video-to-video, a mask image for image-to-image.

reference_image_url.description: URL of the reference image defining the target look and lighting for the replaced region. Allowed formats: JPEG, PNG, WEBP. At least one of reference_image_url or prompt must be provided.

alpha_mode.description: Subject masking strategy: "auto" (AI auto-detects the subject), "fill" (no masking), "select" (propagate a mask from one keyframe), or "custom" (frame-by-frame mask supplied via alpha_url). Defaults to "auto".

max_resolution.description: Maximum output resolution (longer side) in pixels: 720 or 1080. Defaults to 1080. 1080 costs more than 720.

alpha_keyframe_index.description: Frame index (0-based) whose mask is propagated when alpha_mode is "select" on a video. Defaults to the first frame. Ignored for image generation and for the auto, fill, and custom modes.

seed.description: Random seed (0–4294967295) for reproducibility. Omit for a random seed. The seed used is always returned in the response.

prompt.description: Text description of the desired output to guide the generation (max 2000 characters). At least one of prompt or reference_image_url must be provided.

id.description: The ID of the generated video.

status.description: The current status of the generation task.

url.description: The URL where the file can be downloaded from.

error.description: Description of the error, if any.

credits_used.description: The number of tokens consumed during generation.

usd_spent.description: The total amount of money spent by the user in USD.

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request POST \
  --url 'https://api.aimlapi.com/v2/video/generations' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_AIMLAPI_KEY>' \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '{"model": "beeble/switchx-video-to-video", "video_url": "https://example.com/input.jpg", "prompt": "Describe what you want the model to generate."}'
